strengths: The agent's communication was professional, empathetic, and clear, with a polite tone and courtesy to the customer.
The agent was able to escalate the issue to a specialist team and provide a solution, even if it was not immediate.
The agent maintained a positive and respectful attitude throughout the conversation.
improvements: The agent needs to acknowledge and empathize with the customer's concern within the first 30 seconds of the conversation.
The agent should gather all necessary information and provide clear explanations of the next steps, including providing a reference number immediately.
The agent should avoid escalating issues without providing a temporary solution or explanation to the customer.

rephrasing.original: The specialist team will call you back within two working days to resolve the issue.
rephrasing.better: I'm going to escalate this issue to our specialist team, and they will contact you within two working days to provide a resolution. In the meantime, I can offer you a temporary solution or provide more information on what to expect during the call back.

rephrasing.original: A reference number will be generated when the specialist team calls you back.
rephrasing.better: I'm going to provide you with a reference number now, and the specialist team will use this to track your issue. They will contact you within two working days to provide a resolution.
